output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, sys, math, textwrap, itertools, string, statistics
import json, codecs, os, sys, re, unicodedata, math, statistics

# Load the files
quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-FMu3bAgEAQtmEQQC8jx6tp-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-Q1ZkZ7hNQqPEcQ1vsVE9Pf-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran_data = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith_data = json.load(f)

len(quran_data), len(hadith_data)

# Inspect a sample of quran entries
list(quran_data[0].keys())[:20], quran_data[0]

# Filter surah 31
surah_31 = [a for a in quran_data if a['surah_id'] == 31]
len(surah_31), surah_31[0]['surah_name'], surah_31[0], surah_31[-1]['ayah_id']

a18 = next(a for a in surah_31 if a['ayah_id']==18)
a19 = next(a for a in surah_31 if a['ayah_id']==19)
a18, a19

import re
import unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics and Quranic marks
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(
    "[" 
    "\u0610-\u061A"  # additional arabic signs
    "\u064B-\u065F"  # tashkeel
    "\u0670"         # superscript alef
    "\u06D6-\u06ED"  # Quranic marks
    "]+"
)

tatweel = "\u0640"
# Eastern arabic digits
eastern_digits = "٠١٢٣٤٥٦٧٨٩"
eastern_to_western = str.maketrans({c: str(i) for i, c in enumerate(eastern_digits)})

def unify_hamza(s):
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    s = s.replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ؤ", "و")
    s = s.replace("ة", "ه")
    s = s.replace("ٱ", "ا")  # alif wasla
    return s

def normalize_ar(s):
    # Lowercase not matter (Arabic no case), but unify
    s = s.replace("\u200f","").replace("\u200e","")
    s = s.translate(eastern_to_western)
    s = s.replace(tatweel, "")
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub("", s)
    # Remove punctuation incl parentheses, quotes, colon, periods, stop signs etc.
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s)  # remove non word punctuation; keep letters, digits, underscore but underscore not present.
    s = unify_hamza(s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # token-level or char-level LCS? We'll do char-level normalized.
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    # For speed use DP with O(n*m)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        ai = a[i-1]
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if ai == b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def similarity(a, b):
    # compute normalized LCS ratio: lcs*2/(len(a)+len(b))
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_norm, b_norm)
    return 2*l / (len(a_norm)+len(b_norm)), a_norm, b_norm, l

original_full = "وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ وَلَا تَمْشِ فِي الْأَرْضِ مَرَحًا إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُحِبُّ كُلَّ مُخْتَالٍ فَخُورٍ (١٨) وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُض"
candidate = a18['ayah_text'] + " " + a19['ayah_text']

sim, a_norm, b_norm, l = similarity(original_full, candidate)
sim, a_norm, b_norm[:200], l, len(a_norm), len(b_norm)

sim18, a_norm, b_norm, l = similarity(original_full, a18['ayah_text'])
sim18, len(a_norm), len(b_norm)

def tokenize(s):
    s_norm = normalize_ar(s)
    # tokens: split by spaces
    return s_norm.split()

def token_f1(a, b):
    ta = tokenize(a)
    tb = tokenize(b)
    set_a = set(ta)
    set_b = set(tb)
    inter = set_a & set_b
    if not set_a or not set_b:
        return 0.0
    precision = len(inter)/len(set_b)
    recall = len(inter)/len(set_a)
    if precision+recall == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*precision*recall/(precision+recall)
    return f1, precision, recall, set_a, set_b, inter

f1_comb = token_f1(original_full, candidate)[0]
f1_18 = token_f1(original_full, a18['ayah_text'])[0]
f1_19 = token_f1(original_full, a19['ayah_text'])[0]
f1_comb, f1_18, f1_19

def recall_similarity(a, b):
    a_norm = normalize_ar(a)
    b_norm = normalize_ar(b)
    l = lcs_length(a_norm, b_norm)
    return l/len(a_norm), a_norm, b_norm, l, len(a_norm)

rec_sim, a_norm, b_norm, l, la = recall_similarity(original_full, candidate)
rec_sim

phrase2 = "وَلَا تُصَعِّرْ خَدَّكَ لِلنَّاسِ"
matches2 = [a for a in quran_data if normalize_ar(phrase2) in normalize_ar(a['ayah_text'])]
[(m['surah_id'], m['ayah_id']) for m in matches2], matches2[0]['ayah_text']

phrase3 = "وَاقْصِدْ فِي مَشْيِكَ وَاغْضُض"
matches3 = [a for a in quran_data if normalize_ar(phrase3) in normalize_ar(a['ayah_text'])]
[(m['surah_id'], m['ayah_id']) for m in matches3], matches3[0]['ayah_text']
